How to Succeed at Facebook Ads
Getting Started
How Facebook Ads Work: The
Algorithm
When you launch a campaign - you essentially enter an auction against thousands of
other advertisers.
In this training, you'll learn how Facebook decides who wins the auction, and what you
can do to impact/leverage results.
Advanced: B.EA.R and the
Algorithm
The following graph is aimed to help you understand how B.EA.R fits in with everything
else and some troubleshooting tips to leveraging this. Don't worry if you don't
understand this at first, we'll be covering the algorithm more in depth later, and you
can always come back to this chart when things click into place.
Need Help?
If at any stage along your FATC journey
you feel like you need some help, reach
out to one of the crew inside the
Facebook group. Or sign up for one of
the Q&A calls. We've got your back!
